title: Trusted Delivery, Supply Chain, Progressive Release, and Rollback · Product Reasoning Brief: Rollback Rollforward
summary: A release rebuilds across environments, uses mutable dependencies, grants broad automation authority, and has no provenance, canary, or rollback rehearsal. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp2 rollback rollforward increment in trusted progressive delivery dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Rehearse compatible rollback, rollforward, configuration and data recovery, communication, and post-recovery verification.
Deploy the same immutable artifact through readiness, bounded exposure, user-centered signals, hold points, abort, and promotion.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Rollback Rollforward · Theory Rollback Rollforward
steps.instruction:
theory case — Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Rehearse compatible rollback, rollforward, configuration and data recovery, communication, and post-recovery verification.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Rollback Rollforward contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Rollback Rollforward · Theory Rollback Rollforward.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for rehearse compatible rollback, rollforward, configuration and data recovery, communication, and post-recovery verification. For Predict Rollback Rollforward · Theory Rollback Rollforward, keep Rollback Rollforward connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Rehearse compatible rollback, rollforward, configuration and data recovery, communication, and post-recovery verification.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Rollback Rollforward condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

hints: For Predict Rollback Rollforward · Theory Rollback Rollforward, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Rollback Rollforward precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Rollback Rollforward · Theory Rollback Rollforward, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Rehearse compatible rollback, rollforward, configuration and data recovery, communication, and post-recovery verification.

For Predict Rollback Rollforward · Theory Rollback Rollforward, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Returning application code to an older version always restores the service.

options.text: Returning application code to an older version always restores the service. That claim does not survive the predict rollback rollforward evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Rehearse compatible rollback, rollforward, configuration and data recovery, communication, and post-recovery verification. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The worked example variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Rehearse compatible rollback, rollforward, configuration and data recovery, communication, and post-recovery verification. A defensible solution applies Rollback Rollforward, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to trusted progressive delivery dossier.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Returning application code to an older version always restores the service. This fails the Rollback Rollforward contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.
